## WoRMS Taxon Matching

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
Options for taxon matching:

* [WoRMS Taxon Match Tool](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=match)
* Programmatically:
    * [obistools](https://iobis.github.io/obistools/#taxon-matching)::match_taxa
    * [worrms](https://docs.ropensci.org/worrms/reference/wm_records_taxamatch.html)::wm_records_taxamatch
    * [pyworms](https://github.com/iobis/pyworms)

:::

::: {.column width="55%"}

![](/assets/worms-dropdown.png)

::: 
::::

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## No WoRMS match?
Use highest-rank taxon with a match (e.g. family or order). Keep the sequence — it can be re-identified later as reference databases improve.
:::

::: 

::: {.column width="60%"}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## [Still no match?]{style="color:#02C39A"}
Unknown sequences recorded as: 
`scientificName` = “Biota incertae sedis”
`scientificNameID` = urn:lsid:marinespecies.org:taxname:12
:::

::: 
::::
